text: Antiochus was son to the Demetrius whose death is recorded in 10.50, brother to the Demetrius first mentioned in 10.67.

Some Greek manuscripts have ‘on the second day’, instead of ‘once again’, but this is probably a correction, designed to clear up a difficulty. Nothing has been said which implies that the siege described in verse 14 had come to an end; and it is not easy to account for the mention of a second siege, unless we suppose a gap in the manuscript which has been accidentally filled up by verses 15-24.
‘Gedor’ is ‘Cedron’ in the Greek text, here and in verse 40 below, to correspond with verse 9 of the following chapter.
